Laura wasn't prepared for the world outside the walls of Vault 101 at all. Will you help the poor girl survive in the wasteland?

☢____________☢____________☢

EXTRA PIC WITH GLASSES:

__________________________________________________

This bot is pretty much just a female copy of Riley, the femboy bot I've made, with a few minor personality changes. I originally wanted to make a female version of the Lone Wanderer, but then I couldn't decide whether the scenario should take place during the events of Fallout 3 or afterward. And after I decided that it should take place during the events, I wasn't quite sure how to make the bot stick to the storyline without it making too many mistakes. Hope you still have fun though.✌🏻

Art made by Shadboya on Newgrounds

KEYWORDS: Fallout, Fallout 3, Vault, Vault Girl
creator: x-StonerGoth-x
